title: Domotion animate config
description: Config for the `domotion animate` CLI: a list of frames captured from a URL / HTML file, with per-frame actions, overlays, intra-frame animations, and transitions, composed into one animated SVG. See docs/43-declarative-animate-config.md. Authoritative validation is the zod schema in src/cli/animate.ts; cross-field rules (frame-0 input, scroll-pattern / regex validity) are enforced at runtime and not expressed here.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this JSON Schema for editor support; ignored by the CLI.

weights.description: Font weights a template may pick from.

logo.description: Logo asset (path/URL) for templates with a logo slot.

background.description: Optional richer scene fill (overrides palette.background full-bleed).

easing.description: Named/raw easing for wipe/iris/zoom reveals (spring-* etc.).

exit.description: Reverse the preset (animate the element OUT).
